programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A man purchases items such as real estate, boats, and vintage aircraft after stealing over $50 million from a trust fund.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Businessman Martin Shkreli raises the price of a life-saving drug 5,000 percent, but it's his shady accounting and Internet trolling that lands the "Pharma Bro" in hot water.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A thieving shopaholic son murders his family to cash in on the family's wealth; a Chicago health facility owner uses an inflated billing scheme in a $20 million rip off.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Vitaly Borker scores $18 million selling designer knock-off eyewear as genuine from his website in Brooklyn, N.Y.; when customers complain, they are threatened with violence, even murder.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Raj Rajaratnam created one of the biggest insider trading schemes in U.S. history.

programme.title: Lockup: Cincinnati: Extended Stay
programme.desc: An online post from a diehard Dodgers fan leads to his arrest at a Reds game; a tragic shooting leaves one inmate facing prison time and outrage over his punishment leads to more arrests.

programme.title: Lockup: Cincinnati: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A heroin addict must choose between the lifestyle she craves and the young son she has left behind; another seasoned female inmate is transferred back to the jail from state prison, but she suddenly finds herself on the wrong end of a fist.

programme.title: Lockup: New Mexico: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A low-level offender increases his sentence from 18 months to 16-and-a-half years after three separate counts of aggravated battery on an officer; the same inmate was banned from even non-contact visits after an affair with a prison staff nurse.

programme.title: Lockup: New Mexico: Extended Stay
programme.desc: The Penitentiary of New Mexico houses both low level and max-security inmates; Level 6 inmates like Chris Shiverdecker, who has a MacGyver-like prison reputation, are still eligible for hearings that could change custody level and security status.

programme.title: Lockup: New Mexico: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Inmates who become disruptive at the Penitentiary of New Mexico are transferred to the lock-up units in level 5 or 6; the trouble is, their behavior doesn't always improve; this is a lesson rookie officer Amy Lee is learning the hard way.

programme.title: Lockup: Charleston: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A fight breaks out over snacks, but officers want to know if there was something else behind it; an open transgender inmate, who "escorts" on the street, chooses general population over protective custody; an inmate is found dead in his bunk.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: The collapse of Erpenbeck wreaks financial havoc for area home buyers, subcontractors and banks with three company employees pleading guilty to bank fraud.

programme.title: American Greed

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A man, appearing to be nothing more than a wealthy surfer, allegedly commits murder and robs an armored car, leading the FBI on a chase spanning multiple states.

programme.title: Lockup Special Investigation

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: In ancient Mesopotamia, the Sumerians make advances in agriculture, science, medicine, and astronomy, crediting these achievements to winged gods known as the Anunnaki.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Archeologists uncover ancient tombs filled with strange items and writings; remarkable similarities found at these sites cause theorists to believe that some of these technically advanced tombs were designed with the help of extraterrestrials.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Researchers explore the strange similarities among pyramids in Egypt, Central and South America, China, Africa, and Indonesia, including a possible extraterrestrial link connecting these structures.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Historical prophets may have had alien influences; there are some who believe that extraterrestrials have used intermediaries; they were used to transmit important moral, philosophical and artistic codes to humanity.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.desc: The crew of Andromeda is still learning how to work together as they are attacked by the Restorers.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Andromeda gets involved in a feud between a Than planet and a Nietzschean colony. Tyr must choose between his clan or his new family aboard the Andromeda.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A slipstream sends the Andromeda back in time to just before the Commonwealth fell. The crew must intervene to preserve history.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Answering a distress call leads the crew to pick up Beka's brother, now a Wayist, and his friend. They are connected to environmentalists trying to prevent space travel.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A black hole allows Dylan to communicate with his former fiancee, 300 years in the past. He can't abandon his mission to reform the Commonwealth, but can he bring her into the future?

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan is imprisoned on a prison planet and must stage an escape as his crew tries to stage their own rescue.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Castalians board the Andromeda to finalize the charter for the New Commonwealth. When the leader is discovered dead, Tyr is the main suspect.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka learns that her father's former business partner deals in a highly addictive drug called Flash. The rest of the crew holds a "garage sale" to earn money for new ship parts.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Andromeda discovers her "sister ship", the Pax Magellanic. The crew aboard Pax is 300 years old, but have not aged a day

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Tyr crash lands the Eureka Maru on a Nietzschean planet and develops amnesia. He must remember what he is doing before the Nietzscheans discover him and his crate of stolen goods.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Harper receives the "gift" of knowledge from a dying Perseid, only to discover that the Perseid was being hunted by a bounty hunter, who has now turned his attention to Harper.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan is arrested for assassinating a dictator 300 years ago, by the man he helped install in his place. The new dictator ended up being much, much worse.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda is boarded by a drone from the Consensus of Parts, a mythical mechanical society. While friendly at first, the drone tries to force the ship to join the Consensus.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Margie Cooper and Ochuko Ojiri head to Worcestershire in their quest for big profits. Margie learns about Victorian kitchen gadgets -- could she make it as a maid? And Ochuko is drawn to a piece of 1970s modern art.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In Wiltshire, Ochuko Ojiri spies a trunk filled with silver and tries to buy the lot, while Margie Cooper purchases an Edwardian shoe sign and an early 20th century mbira. Who will make the most cash at the final auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Starting off in Kent in a 1960s Citroean 2CV, it's a feisty reunion in Kent for veteran Road Trippers Catherine Southon and David Harper as they discover that ten years apart hasn't dulled their competitive edge.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and David Harper call on a doggy antique appraiser as they travel along the Sussex coast. David gets into trouble playing cricket in a shop full of china and Catherine hunts for items with an aeronautical theme.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and David Harper are on the Isle of Wight and around Hampshire. David goes for Dutch dishes, while Catherine finds a Scottish Wemyss ware jar. Plus, how homesick French WWII sailors helped introduce garlic to the area.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: David Harper and Catherine Southon go digging for bargains on the Jurassic Coast. Catherine is attracted to an old clothes rail while David goes for another piece of Delft. And the auction is watched from a former courtroom!

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and David Harper are on their last leg in Devon heading to the final auction in Leicestershire, and their jaunt affords them lots of places to unearth things with an interesting past.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Irita Marriott and Mark Hill set out in a sky blue 1967 Triumph Herald for their first trip together, hunting for antiques to sell at auction. Irita spends big on her beloved porcelain while Mark invests in mid-century Italian ceramics.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Irita Marriott and Mark Hill continue their search for money making treasures. Some Victorian anatomy molds and a 200-year-old Regency ornament go under the gavel.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In the Fens, Irita Marriott uncovers something so gold and gaudy that it might not sell, and Mark Hill falls head-over-heels for a very stylish, and shiny, mid-century kitchen appliance. Plus, a collectible with a very gruesome history.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the final chance for Mark Hill and Irita Marriott's to buy profit-making collectibles, but will a shoe shaped pin cushion or a 1970s motorbike sell for the most at auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.desc: Ciara gives Alex a chance; Paige makes a confession to Craig that leaves him livid; with Kyle and Amanda's rocky relationship on display, the ladies of the house stage an intervention with Amanda; Lindsay learns some life-changing news.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Wheelchair-bound June Anderson is strangled in the villa she is renting with husband Doug and sister Janice; though Janice is her beneficiary and has no alibi, Poole suspects Doug, a former colleague whom he knows to be corrupt and an alcoholic.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A hurricane approaches Saint-Marie as the police team strives to solve the murder of a young meteorologist staged to look like it was caused by a natural disaster.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A mystery man flees the scene after a shot is fired at charity fundraiser and the host is found dead in his study.

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries
programme.desc: Lynley and Havers investigate the murder of a doorkeeper at the House of Lords; when a clerk at the House is also killed, events seem to point to a conspiracy involving stolen documents.

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries
programme.desc: Lynley and Havers are called to Smithfield's market where the body of a man has been found frozen on a meat truck.

programme.desc: An officer from the Metropolitan Police takes over Davey's investigation.

programme.desc: Jane investigates when a treasure hunter is found dead in his own home.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Navaja
programme.desc: Cuando un marine es encontrado muerto, Gibbs, Fornell y el equipo se dirigen a la carretera para detener una operación ilegal de camiones.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Día de las madres
programme.desc: Los secretos surgen cuando la ex suegra de Gibbs aparece como testigo en la investigación de un asesinato.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Buen policía, mal policía
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de una anciana por una bala perdida. Mientras, Frank es ridiculizado por disciplinar a un policía irrespetuoso y Erin ayuda a su detective Anthony.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Por la comunidad
programme.desc: Erin y Anthony intentan evitar la deportación de la activista comunitaria Coryna Garza (Judy Reyes), quien no es ciudadana, y Frank debe decidir si el NYPD participará en la redada de alto perfil de los Marshals de EE. UU. contra una pandilla local.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El delator
programme.desc: Mientras Frank se enfrenta a un denunciante de la policía de Nueva York que afirma tener pruebas de abuso de poder en la organización, Danny y Báez investigan el caso de una mujer que fue atropellada por un coche en circunstancias sospechosas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Culpable por asociación
programme.desc: Cuando un testigo clave en el caso de Danny es asesinado justo antes de testificar, Erin enfurece a Danny al pedirle ayuda a Anthony (Steve Schrippa) para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando Morgan es secuestrado, la UAC se apresura a buscarlo y salvarle la vida.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige a Wichita en busca de un sospechoso que secuestra niños mientras sus padres duermen. Además, Morgan está intentando averiguar quién fue el responsable del ataque.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un sujeto ataca a la UAC, el equipo entra en acción para averiguar quién es el responsable.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la ex miembro del equipo de la UAC y actual agente de la Interpol, Emily Prentiss localiza a un asesino en serie internacional, pide la ayuda de sus amigos de la UAC.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Día de las madres
programme.desc: Los secretos surgen cuando la ex suegra de Gibbs aparece como testigo en la investigación de un asesinato.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Doble identidad
programme.desc: El equipo investiga el asesinato de un marine y descubre más cosas sobre su vida de las que nadie habría imaginado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Jurisdicción
programme.desc: El equipo descubre sorprendentes similitudes entre ellos y sus homólogos del CGIS cuando aparece muerto un buzo de la Marina que buscaba un tesoro hundido.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Placer culpable
programme.desc: La muerte de un oficial de la Marina lleva a Gibbs y al equipo al mundo de las prostitutas de lujo, confiando en la madame Holly Snow para que les ayude a atrapar a un asesino.

programme.title: La Duquesa

programme.title: El paciente inglés
programme.desc: Poderosa e inolvidable, la ganadora de 9 premios Óscar, incluso Mejor Película, Mejor Director (Anthony Minghella) y Mejor Actriz de Reparto (Juliette Binoche), desarrolla una increíble historia de pasión, intriga y aventura.

programme.title: Implacable
programme.desc: Max, en su imaginación, es un implacable galán que hace suspirar a las mujeres. Su vida dará un giro cuando convence a Dan, un joven listo, atleta y culto, a que lo tome bajo su tutela, y ambos compiten por el amor de la misma mujer.

programme.title: Las estafadoras
programme.desc: Una mujer y su hija son estafadoras profesionales que utilizan sus armas de seducción para engañar a millonarios, hasta que la joven hija se enamora poniendo en apuros el último golpe: un excéntrico magnate del tabaco.

programme.title: Footloose
programme.desc: El citadino Ren MacCormack se muda a un pequeño pueblo donde el rock and roll y el baile están prohibidos. Su espíritu rebelde sacude a la población.

programme.title: Fama
programme.desc: Fama es la inspiradora historia de un grupo de bailarines, cantantes, músicos y actores de la Escuela Secundaria de Artes Escénicas de la Ciudad de Nueva York, y su enérgico impulso por hacer realidad sus sueños de estrellato.

programme.title: Cosa de hombres
programme.desc: Jason Lee interpreta a un ejecutivo en la ciudad de Seattle que se va a casar con la hija de su jefe (Selma Blair). Su vida se convierte en una pesadilla cuando no se acuerda si la engañó durante su despedida de soltero.

programme.title: Petróleo sangriento
programme.desc: Una epopeya en expansión sobre la familia, la fe, el poder y el petróleo. La historia narra la vida de Daniel Plainview, quien se transforma a sí mismo de un minero de la plata en un magnate petrolero hecho por cuenta propia.

programme.title: El Lamento de la Serpiente Negra
programme.desc: En este relato sobre el amor, el candidato para el Premio Óscar(r) Samuel L. Jackson y Christina Ricci buscan la redención en el sur profundo a través del poder del blues y la transcendencia de una extraña amistad.

programme.title: Cuando los hermanos se encuentran
programme.desc: Tom Cruise interpreta a un comerciante de ruedas egocéntrico que descubre que tiene un hermano autista (Dustin Hoffman) y lo lleva a un viaje inolvidable por todo el país en esta histérica, profunda y conmovedora ganadora del Oscar® a la Mejor Película.

programme.title: Testigo en Peligro
programme.desc: Cuando una joven Amish y su hijo se encuentran envueltos en el asesinato de un agente antinarcóticos encubierto, su salvador resulta ser el duro detective de Filadelfia John Book.

programme.title: En defensa del honor
programme.desc: Bruce Willis interpreta a un oficial encarcelado que se niega a abandonar su lucha contra los nazis, incluso desde detrás de las líneas de los enemigos.

programme.title: Tierra de sueños
programme.desc: Un joven se encuentra en un dilema, cuando descubre a una ladrona de bancos escondiéndose en su pequeña aldea; entre reclamar la recompensa por su cabeza y su creciente atracción por la seductora delincuente.

programme.title: Tierra de policias
programme.desc: El director de Ford vs. Ferrari junta a un elenco de estrellas que incluye a Robert De Niro, Sylvester Stallone, Ray Liotta y Harvey Keitel en este tenso thriller lleno de acción y crimen.

programme.title: 13 horas: los soldados secretos de Bengasi
programme.desc: Del director Michael Bay, 13 horas es la historia de un grupo élite de seis exmilitares asignados para proteger a la CIA, que lucharon cuando los terroristas atacaron un complejo diplomático estadounidense el 11 de septiembre de 2012.

programme.title: Doble impacto
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme hace el papel de los gemelos, Chad y Alex Wagner, hermanos separados tras el brutal asesinato de sus padres. Veinticinco años después, el destino los reúne para vengarse y causar un dolor doble.

programme.title: Cyborg
programme.desc: En una tierra azotada por la plaga del siglo XXI, un hermoso Cyborg mitad humano tiene la información que puede salvar la civilización. ¡Pero solo la fortaleza y astucia de un guerrero solitario será capaz de salvar esos hechos importantes!

programme.title: Contacto sangriento
programme.desc: El maestro de Ninjutsu Frank Dux viaja a Hong Kong para participar en el Kumite, las olimpiadas de artes marciales, y conoce a una hermosa periodista estadounidense. Al poco tiempo deberá enfrentarse a Chong-Li, un despiadado maestro coreano de taekwondo.

programme.title: Rambo: Primera Sangre
programme.desc: El veterano de la guerra de Vietnam, John J. Rambo, vaga a una pequeña ciudad de Washington en busca de su viejo amigo, pero se encuentra con la intolerancia y brutalidad del aguacil, Will Teasle.

programme.title: Rambo II: la misión
programme.desc: John Rambo is enviado a una misión al sureste de Asia para rastrear a unos prisioneros de guerra, pero termina enfrentando a soldados vietnamitas que resguardan los campos.

programme.title: Ben-Hur (2016)
programme.desc: La novela épica de redención de Lew Wallace vuelve con esta conmovedora adaptación en la que un noble inculpado (Jack Huston) sobrevive a años de esclavitud para vengarse del amigo (Toby Kebbell) que lo traicionó. Coprotagonizada por Morgan Freeman.

programme.title: La familia Addams
programme.desc: Ven y únete a La Familia Addams ¡para el festival del terror más hilarante de la temporada o de cualquier otra

programme.title: La sublevación de los oceanos
programme.desc: Un científico construye un arca enorme después de que se ignoran sus advertencias de una inundación que destruirá la Tierra. El desastre es inevitable, y los que difamaron al científico suben al arca desesperados, antes de que el mundo se ahogue.

programme.title: Sherlock Gnomes (ESP)
programme.desc: ¡Únete a una aventura fe-gnome-nal en el mundo secreto de los gnomos de jardín! Cuando Gnomeo y Julieta descubren que sus amigos han desaparecido, junto al detective SHERLOCK GNOMES, resuelven el misterio y traen a los gnomos a casa.

programme.title: La familia Addams
programme.desc: Ven y únete a La Familia Addams ¡para el festival del terror más hilarante de la temporada o de cualquier otra

programme.title: Los locos Addams II
programme.desc: El futuro de la familia se torna incierto cuando la malvada niñera se casa con Lucas mientras los niños están embarcados en un campamento de verano. Pero Merlina tiene aún una o dos cartas bajo la manga…

programme.title: Bumblebee (ESP)
programme.desc: Bumblebee, un robot herido y destrozado, es encontrado y reparado por una adolescente llamada Charlie. Ambos deberán unir fuerzas para salvar el planeta de los malvados Decepticons en esta aventura llena de acción para toda la familia.

programme.title: Un detective suelto en Hollywood III
programme.desc: Axel Foley (Eddie Murphy), que investiga una red de robo de coches, se encuentra con algo mucho más grande que eso: los mismos hombres que mataron a su jefe llevan una red de blanqueo de dinero en un parque temático de Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Jacuzzi al pasado
programme.desc: ¡Prepárese a olvidar el pasado con la versión inapropiada más salvaje del jacuzzi al pasado! Las risas comienzan cuando cuatro amigos comparten una noche en un jacuzzi en un resort de esquí, y se despiertan con una fuerte resaca en 1986.

programme.title: Atardecer
programme.desc: En esta comedia hilarante y llena de acción, los mejores amigos Logan y Blake viajan a la destinación exótica de Puerto Vallarta para las vacaciones de primavera. Allí van a encontrar un paraíso de tequila con grandes problemas.

programme.title: Enchufe sin visa
programme.desc: Una divertida comedia de seis latinos que viajan a Estados Unidos y pronto se verán inmersos en las situaciones más ridículas y vergonzosas. Desde un estudiante de intercambio, a una ingenua actriz, cada uno vivirá peripecias inesperadas.

programme.title: Jugando con fuego
programme.desc: Cuando el bombero Jake Carson (John Cena) y su equipo (Keegan-Michael Key y John Leguizamo) rescatan a tres hermanos que se encontraban en la trayectoria de un incendio forestal.

programme.title: Nacho Libre (en español)
programme.desc: Jack Black encarna el papel más gracioso como Ignacio, un cocinero de monasterio que alimenta huérfanos de día y por las noches se transforma en Nacho Libre, un notorio luchador en calzas.

programme.title: Escuela de rock
programme.desc: Jack Black interpreta a un guitarrista con delirios de grandeza. Cuando lo echan de la banda, y se pone a buscar trabajo, se convierte en un maestro suplente y hace de su clase una banda de rock and roll.

programme.title: Jugando con fuego
programme.desc: Cuando el bombero Jake Carson (John Cena) y su equipo (Keegan-Michael Key y John Leguizamo) rescatan a tres hermanos que se encontraban en la trayectoria de un incendio forestal.

programme.title: No manches Frida 2
programme.desc: El exconvicto reformado, Zequi (Omar Chaparro), enfrenta una crisis cuando su boda con Lucy (Martha Higareda) se cancela. Mientras intenta recuperar su amor, debe liderar a su escuela en un torneo crucial contra el exnovio perfecto de Lucy. ¡Caos total!

programme.title: Amor a primera visa
programme.desc: Alejandro, un mariachi, y su mejor amigo, Canicas, aprovechan un encuentro casual como una oportunidad para hacer cambiar de opinión a la joven de la embajada, Rachel, que rechazó la solicitud de visa de su hija para visitar EE. UU.

programme.title: Todo Incluido
programme.desc: Una familia de vacaciones se ve obligada a esconderse en su habitación de hotel cuando un huracán arrasa el centro turístico, donde pronto empiezan a revelarse verdades que han permanecido ocultas durante mucho tiempo.

programme.title: Besos de Azúcar
programme.desc: Nacho es un niño que intenta sobrevivir los primeros años de su adolescencia como refugiado bailando en una máquina. Su vida cambia drásticamente cuando conoce a Mayra.

programme.title: 1618 (LAS)
programme.desc: The Inquisition continues the persecution of Portuguese Jews.

programme.title: Compadres
programme.desc: Un policía mexicano y un joven americano hacker de computadores, unen fuerzas para entregar un criminal a la justicia en esta comedia de acción llena de altas emociones y risas escandalosas.

programme.title: Cantinflas
programme.desc: Cantinflas es la historia jamás contada de la mayor y más adorada estrella mexicana de la comedia de todos los tiempos.

programme.title: Casese Quien Pueda
programme.desc: The best-laid love plans go hilariously awry in this romantic-comedy hit about two sisters (Martha and Miriam Higareda) who find themselves in uncharted romantic territory.

programme.title: Guerra mundial Z
programme.desc: Guerra Mundial Z es una acelerada epopeya de lo que podrían ser los últimos días de la raza humana. El ex colaborador de la ONU Gerry Lane (Brad Pitt) es llamado para ayudar a acabar con la caótica pandemia que se extiende por el mundo.

programme.title: El lobo de snow hollow
programme.desc: El sheriff de un pueblo pequeño y su apático equipo de oficiales deben resolver una serie de asesinatos que ocurren en la luna llena. Mientras es consumido por la búsqueda del asesino, lucha por recordarse a sí mismo que los hombres lobo no existen...

programme.title: Terror al anochecer
programme.desc: En 1946, el pueblo de Texarkana sufrió una serie de experiencias traumáticas que todavía recuerda hoy, treinta años más tarde, entre marzo y mayo, cinco personas fueron asesinadas a manos de un loco enmascarado.

programme.title: La hermandad
programme.desc: Edward Dalton (Ethan Hawke) es investigador en 2019, año en que una plaga convirtió en vampiros a la población. A medida que los humanos se extinguen, los vampiros deben encontrar un sustituto de la sangre. Un hallazgo puede salvar a la humanidad.

programme.title: Jessabelle
programme.desc: Una chica se enfrenta cara a cara con un espíritu que, después de mucho tiempo de tormento, ha estado buscando su regreso.

programme.title: Campamento del terror
programme.desc: En la búsqueda de diversión y nuevas experiencias, cuatro jóvenes se apuntan como monitores de un campamento. La noche anterior a la llegada de los niños y sin motivo aparente, comienzan a atacarse furiosamente entre ellos.

programme.title: Tierra de vampiros
programme.desc: Cuando se desata una epidemia de vampirismo y su familia es asesinada, el joven Martin (Connor Paolo) se vuelve el protegido de un canoso y obstinado cazador (Nick Damici) cuya nueva presa son los muertos vivientes.

programme.title: Hour Of The Gun
programme.desc: Director John Sturges presents a reworking of the Wyatt Earp/Doc Holliday legend and the struggle for political control of Tombstone, with a marvelous trio of antagonists: James Garner as Earp, Jason Robards as Holliday, and Robert Ryan as Clanton.

programme.title: Support Your Local Sheriff!
programme.desc: James Garner stars in this rollicking western spoof that has him taking on the job of a frontier town sheriff who must fend off villains (led by Walter Brennen) from every direction...all without breaking a sweat or dirtying his shiny black boots!

programme.title: Support Your Local Gunfighter
programme.desc: James Garner is back in the saddle again as hustler Latigo Smith whose latest con is passing off cowhand Jug (Jack Elam) as the dreaded gunman Swifty Morgan. But when the real Swifty shows up, the Wild West is going to get a whole lot wackier!

programme.title: Riders In The Sky
programme.desc: Gene Autry helps a gal clear her father's name who is accused of murdering a gambler. When the leader of the gamblers gets involved, it's up to Gene and his comic pal Pat Buttram to outwit the badmen.

programme.title: Sons Of New Mexico
programme.desc: Gene Autry becomes the guardian of a wayward boy who is in debt. Gene sends him to the New Mexico Military Institute, where he falls in with bad companions and is framed for a murder of an ex-jockey.

programme.title: Mule Train
programme.desc: When natural cement is discovered by two prospectors, one is murdered during a claim jump attempt. Marshal Gene Autry befriends the lone prospector and tries to help him promote his cement discovery.

programme.title: Union Bound
programme.desc: Sargent Hoover went to war to preserve the Union. After being captured and sent to a prisoner of war camp, he understood what it was to be kept against his will. Together with a friend he escaped and aided by slaves made it to freedom.

programme.title: The Missouri Breaks
programme.desc: Marlon Brando and Jack Nicholson ignite the screen in this rousing story of a wealthy Montana rancher who hires a professional killer to track down a gang of horse thieves.

programme.title: Breakheart Pass
programme.desc: As a train races through the Rocky Mountains, the passengers are being murdered! The only hope is John Deakin (Charles Bronson) who uncovers a secret that explodes in a torrent of shocking revelations, explosive brawls, and blazing gun battles.

programme.title: Lilies Of The Field
programme.desc: Nominated for 5 Academy Awards® including Best Picture and winner of the Best Actor Oscar® for Sidney Poitier for his role as an itinerant handyman who stops to help five impoverished nuns and the small Arizona desert town in which they reside.

programme.title: Paris Blues
programme.desc: Ram (Paul Newman) and Eddie (Sidney Poitier) are two expatriate jazz musicians living in Paris, where their music is celebrated. When they fall in love with two vacationing American girls, they must decide if they should move back to America with them.

programme.title: The Defiant Ones
programme.desc: In Stanley Kramer's cinema classic, screen legends Sidney Poitier and Tony Curtis star as two convicts on the run from a Southern work gang who are bound together by an unbreakable iron chain and separated by an unbridled hatred for each other.

programme.title: Pork Chop Hill
programme.desc: Gregory Peck heads an all-star cast in this true re-enactment of the terrifying Korean War that brilliantly pulls the viewer inextricably into the crossfire that surrounds American foot soldiers.

programme.title: The Children's Hour (1962)
programme.desc: In this provocatively daring film, an attention-seeking schoolgirl vengefully spreads rumors that her teachers (Audrey Hepburn and Shirley MacLaine) are lesbians.

programme.title: Guys and Dolls
programme.desc: In New York, a gambler is challenged to take a cold female missionary to Havana, but they fall for each other, and the bet has a hidden motive to finance a crap game.

programme.title: The Fugitive Kind
programme.desc: In this Tennessee Williams masterpiece, Marlon Brando is superb as a paradoxical drifter drawn into the desperate lives of two passionate women, Maureen Stapleton and Joanne Woodward, in a small Mississippi town.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver's (Eddie Albert) nephew Charles (Don Edmonds) arrives for a visit, and Oliver is completely shaken up when the boy turns out to be a long-haired, motorcycle-ridin', hippy-dippy type. But, boy, does he know a thing or two about engines.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver dreams of entering his crop in the Corn Festival, but the dreaded Bing Bug invades Hooterville's farms. After learning of his service as a WWII pilot, the locals volunteer him for the perilous task of flying the town's only crop duster.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When a lovely, young and successful farmer comes to Oliver (Eddie Albert) for his legal counsel, Lisa (Eva Gabor) quickly becomes jealous of the two spending time together and becomes determined to break up what she sees as a budding romance.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When the Monroe Brothers show up to fix the Douglas's closet, Lisa learns that Ralph is devastated because her true love has stood her up on another date. Lisa's solution: an intensive, two-day beauty treatment for Ralph…and the barn for Oliver!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) takes to his soap box, delivering fiery, patriotic speeches after getting a bill from the State Farm Unattached Duty Tax for an outrageous $12.03! But no one can figure out why the tax is levied in the first place.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie will do anything to get a promotion at the loading dock. So, he agrees to help Mr. Sanders with his latest charity, unaware that it involves something that goes against his morals - organ donation.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: While driving Munson's cab, Archie saves the life of a beautiful woman who becomes unconscious. Uh, was that a woman? Sorry, that was no woman, thanks to female impersonator Beverly LaSalle's convincing act.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike - along with everyone else - debate where he should be when Gloria is in the delivery room giving birth to their baby.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie rips up a chain letter, thinking it to be nothing more than baloney. Then a whole bunch of accidents happen. Coincidence or did Archie really set off the string of mishaps?

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: When Maude breaks the news that she's been asked to run for the State Senate, everyone is happy and proud, but Walter, who fears her political life would ruin their marriage.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: When Maude decides to run for the State Senate, Walter decides to run to the nearest swinging-singles bachelor pad -- it looks like Maude may have struck out for the fourth time in the marital sweepstakes.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude and Walter's separation is on a collision course as each shows up at the Harmons' anniversary party with a 'date.' Broadway musical-comedy star Bernadette Peters guest stars as Kathy Rivers, Walter's date for the party.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude decides her marriage is over -- Walter has fallen off the wagon and was seen by her in a compromising situation. Then Walter comes home with hopes of patching things up only to find Maude herself in a compromising situation.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: It's Maude's moment of truth. After a long campaign for the State Senate and an equally tough campaign to save her marriage, it's election day in Tuckahoe.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: How do you say to your best friend, 'Welcome home -- your dog is dead!'? That's the problem facing a hysterical Maude when Vivian' s dog, Chuck, dies while in Maude's care.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a hilarious shock to the cabbies when Rev. Jim brings his new pet to the garage—an over-the-hill racehorse that he bought after cashing in on the 300-to-1 long shot. However, he soon finds that it’s impossible to housebreak a horse.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby faces a humorous predicament when it becomes obvious that one of the biggest talent managers in New York is representing him because of his prowess as a lover, and not for his ability as an actor.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a protest against unsafe equipment, the cabbies go on strike, and Louie offers an unusual solution to the problem to shop steward Elaine.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a hilarious caper, Louie and the cabbies pool all their cash to buy a painting at an auction, planning to cash in big when the artist dies—but when the bidding gets too heavy, the gang turns a dignified auction into a frolicking free-for-all.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Oscar tries to cure Felix of his fear of flying so he can cover a major photographic assignment.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Much to Oscar's delight, Felix moves out of their apartment to take a job in Buffalo in his brother's bubble gum factory.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix develops a severe case of insomnia and Oscar tries to help his roommate.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix becomes an active member of the Civilian Police Reserves and looms as a threat to criminals everywhere -- and to innocent citizens, as well.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: More than a few tears are shed as Mike and Sally get married and move out of state and Ernie finds out his foster parents have to leave the country.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Steve has a lot to think about when Chip suggests that they become Ernie's new foster family.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Charley might have found the solution to the problem of fostering Ernie when he asks Steve to consider adopting the boy.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Charley and Steve are worried about Robbie when they discover he's dating a woman who works as a dancer.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The Sparta jail descends into complete and utter chaos when the six wives of a bigamist (guest star Ted Lange) all show up to visit and shower him with gifts. But when the man turns up dead in his cell, which of his wives turns out to be a murderer?

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: An escaped convict and his girlfriend leave a trail of bodies in their wake as they travel through Mississippi and eventually take Althea and Scooter, the grandson of one of their victims, as hostages in a desperate bid for freedom.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Mike and Steve face the ugly task of discovering who has become a syndicate informer.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A trio of violent prison escapees leaves a trail of blood by murdering or crippling everyone they see.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Kidnapping and murder are linked to a boy stealing medicine for his ailing sister.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: An elderly gentleman "takes from the rich and gives to the poor" to help with fellow senior citizens' medical expenses.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Believing her baby was kidnapped, not stillborn as people claim, a mother embarks on a murderous quest to find the truth.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Peggy is kidnapped under orders of a crime boss to force Mannix to find an undercover man in his organization, whom he intends to have killed.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix's dying friend's words give him a clue as to why he accidentally killed another man, took a woman hostage, and what organization he was involved in.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Late one night, Joe Mannix is surprised by Gen. Alec Holt, his former commanding officer in Korea, now a good friend and vice-president of Coronet Electronics.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: While visiting a rural property to investigate a case, Mannix is attacked by two bikers and nearly killed.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby Jones comes out of retirement to find the man who murdered his son in cold blood. Teaming up with Barnaby is another private investigator by the name of Frank Cannon, an old friend of his late son Hal.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A millionaire sets up a bomb in his boat to fake his death. Barnaby is contacted by the girlfriend of his boat "captain" to investigate what happened. Small clues like hand-tied flies, a cat boarded at a vet's, and an apple slicer bring Barnaby.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A black funeral wreath on his office door predicts Barnaby's death on Sunday. Even after he figures out who the psycho ex-convict is with a vendetta against him, Barnaby is stymied until his daughter-in-law is held hostage.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Three months after the execution of Lewis Sweeney, explosions are still rocking the LA area every four days. The unpopular Dr. Sloan continues his efforts to nail Carter Sweeney for the bombings.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Cooper discovers he had forgotten about the message under his bed. Shelly and Bobby begin Leo's home care. Sternwood hears pretrial motions and declares Leo not fit for trial. Nadine comes home, still thinking she's in high school.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: James saves the girls from a tormented Harold. Cooper brings Audrey home. Bobby and Shelly learn that their insurance plans have backfired. Donna tries to convince Truman that Harold Smith has Laura's secret diary.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Cooper and the One-Armed Man inspect guests at the Great Northern. Hawk finds Harold Smith dead by his own hand…with a mysterious suicide note and the diary torn to shreds. Leo speaks to Bobby about "new shoes."

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Hunter investigates the case of a teenage boy who mistakenly shot his parents during what he claimed was a home invasion.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall enter the world of baby brokering when they find the murdered body of an expensive call girl, and a two-year-old toddler left unharmed.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: While investigating the apparent suicide of Hunter's friend from his days in Vietnam, Hunter and McCall uncover a 20-year-old betrayal that is still killing people today.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When a hit-and-run patient mysteriously dies in the hospital, Dr. Sloan and his interns, Jack and Amanda, put their amateur crime solving abilities to the test.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A mobster's gun moll fakes her way past hospital security guards, and Dr. Sloan almost becomes her next victim! Attractive and smart, no one suspected Amy Westin's true identity.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Tonight, of all nights, Murphy's Law is definitely operating at its worst! After finally finagling all the details to put together a money-raising telethon for the hospital, Dr. Sloan loses his cool when the host of the show is murdered - on the air!

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A five-year-old case is coming to a close when a serial murderer is finally facing the death penalty. But everyone's dreams come back to haunt them and Walker follows his instincts in believing that they got the wrong man scheduled to die.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker and Trivette go undercover to bust an illegal fight circuit.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker doesn't trust a couple of FBI agents, who are on the trail of a Native American accused of murder.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker and Trivette are on the trail of a drug ring, while a new dean at the local college campus seems to have the inside track to Alex, impeding the investigation of several rapes in the past several months at the same time.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al's fraudulent lawsuit against the mall is jeopardized by his desire to win a bowling championship.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: When Al and Peggy go to a basketball game, Peggy switches seats with Al and her seat is chosen for a $10,000 free throw contest.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al helps his childhood girlfriend deal with a young tough guy and his gang.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: The family thinks Bud is insane when they overhear him talking to himself in his room.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: When the Bundys start having good luck, Al remembers the Bundy Curse and realizes he is doomed.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Marcy tries to imagine being in the bedroom to improve her ability to speak in front of large audiences, but her fantasies tend to go a little too wild.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: When the Bundys start having good luck, Al remembers the Bundy Curse and realizes he is doomed.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Marcy tries to imagine being in the bedroom to improve her ability to speak in front of large audiences, but her fantasies tend to go a little too wild.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Steve escorts a visiting congresswoman.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: The school bully teaches Chip to steal lunches.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Robbie's guitar playing and singing makes him at hit at the local coffeehouse.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Steve admires the beautiful and shy owner of a local café.

programme.title: Dennis the Menace
programme.desc: When Mr. Wilson's Aunt Emma pays him a visit, she takes an instant liking to Dennis, causing Mr. Wilson to fear that she will make Dennis her heir instead of him.

programme.title: Dennis the Menace
programme.desc: Dennis eludes his babysitter to go to the movie that his parents are seeing.

programme.title: Dennis the Menace
programme.desc: Dennis and Tommy replace a fallen street signpost but fail to notice they’ve put it up with the street names facing in the wrong direction.

programme.title: Dennis the Menace
programme.desc: Henry and George try to go fishing without Dennis.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: Mother Goes To School
programme.desc: Betty and Margaret end up in the same English class at college.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: The Indispensable Man
programme.desc: Bud is benched for the big game after breaking the coach's bedtime rule.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: Kathy's Big Chance
programme.desc: Kathy wins a contest to appear with Greer Garson at her latest film opening, but gets the chicken pox.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: Margaret Learns To Drive
programme.desc: Jim teaches Margaret how to drive, but they end up in a fight.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Bill thinks the twins take advantage of him and French because they give in to their every wish. Bill says to deny the twins sometimes so they do not get spoiled. Buffy and Jody make a trophy for their uncle, but get sick from the clay.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: A friend of Bill's is an actor who wants to shadow Mr. French in preparation for a movie role. Meanwhile, Cissy has trouble finding someone to ask to the Girls Tag Day Dance.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: When a neighboring family has a baby, the children start to ask questions about where babies come from. Uncle Bill has to explain.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Buffy is in love with Jody's friend, but he has eyes for Cissy.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Jan wears a brunette wig in hopes of being noticed.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Greg moves into the den and transforms it into a mod-pad.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia joins a boy scout troop to support women’s lib.

programme.title: Classica Spotlight
programme.desc: Cinematic clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.desc: Cinematic clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.desc: Soloists of the Lucerne Festival Orchestra present Mozart's "Divertimento No. 11 in D major, KV 251" and Beethoven's "Septet in E flat major, Op. 20," recorded in 2020 in Lucerne, Switzerland.

programme.title: Tchaikovsky - Symphony No. 2, Op. 17
programme.desc: Sir John Eliot Gardiner leads the Orchestra del Maggio Musicale Fiorentino in a concert program that includes Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky's Symphony No. 2 in C minor, Op. 17, "Little Russian."

programme.title: La Belle
programme.desc: A ballet in three acts by Jean-Christophe Maillot; music by Tchaikovsky.

programme.title: Nelsons and Opolais Perform Dvořák
programme.desc: Nelsons with Kristine Opolais and the Gewandhausorchester Leipzig present a program dedicated to Antonín Dvořák, singing the melodies with warm colors; Nelsons' tempos remain calm and relaxed, allowing Dvořák's music to flood the Gewandhaus.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When a 30-year-old mother fails to report for duty in Virginia, the Army lists her as AWOL. Her family immediately suspects foul play. They embark on a 13-year quest for answers before an eyewitness blows the case wide open.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Nine years after the murders of a mother and her teenage daughters, a wiretapped conversation helps police to crack the case. And the baffling murder of a Virginia woman is solved when human bones are discovered by a geologist in North Carolina.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: When a church deacon is found shot to death it looks like police may have stumbled upon a multi-party murder plot. And, a wife remains a key suspect in her husband's murder case for six years, until she attempts to prove her own innocence.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When 23-year-old Tonya McKinley is found brutally murdered on New Years Day 1985, a little boy is left motherless. A family must wait 35 years for advancements in forensic science to finally catch a killer using familial DNA.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: It takes nine years and the work of cutting-edge forensic toxicologists to solve the murder of a medical examiner's wife. Then, a determined Alabama sheriff reopens the case of the deaths of two babies, hoping to get their mother to confess.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: March 1984. Jack Kennedy discovers his daughters brutally murdered. Their mother and niece spend their lives keeping the case alive. DNA leads nowhere. 30 years later, an informant gives up a name.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: New DNA technology and the national DNA databank help police hunt down a rapist-killer 11 years after he committed his crimes, and a detective's painstaking recreation of a woman's shooting death proves it wasn't an accident.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: A killer authors a book about his con-man past that becomes the key to solving a 29-year-old cold case of two high school sweethearts--and three other cold case murders--leading police to believe he could be the Zodiac Killer.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los investigadores examinan las cenizas de un incendio que mató a una mujer de 40 años. El fuego parecía haber sido iniciado por un cigarrillo desatendido.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Fuego Plástico
programme.desc: Sheila Bryan, quien fue condenada por matar a su madre en el incendio de un carro, recibe un nuevo juicio. La opinión de un testigo experto en incendios sobre cómo se encendió el fuego difiere de la teoría de la fiscalía.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2000, cuando la adolescente Tara Munsey desapareció al salir de su trabajo en un restaurante de Virginia, no se sabe si se escapó o si fue víctima de un juego sucio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asesinato brutal, muchos sospechosos y pruebas contradictorias, pero los forenses fueron claros en una cosa: el asesino conocía a su víctima. Y eso les dio a los investigadores una ventaja.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando un miembro adinerado de la sociedad muere después de caer de las escaleras, los testimonios de los testigos contradicen la evidencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Dentro de un cabello
programme.desc: Una mirada retrospectiva al caso del violador de River Park, que asaltó a cuatro mujeres en South Bend, Indiana, durante 1996. Los agentes del orden arrestaron a Richard Alexander, quien fue declarado culpable en 1998 y sentenciado a 70 años de prisión.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una fría noche de Diciembre de 1993, Rose Larner se detuvo en una tienda cuando se dirigía a la casa de su novio. Nunca más se la vio ni se supo de ella.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: A cenar y ver una película
programme.desc: La hora de la muerte se vuelve fundamental después de que se encuentra asesinada a una mujer embarazada en su habitación con aire acondicionado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Destinado a la cárcel
programme.desc: Una mujer es encontrada muerta en un barranco, pero las fuertes tormentas habían arrastrado pruebas cruciales de la escena del crimen. En dos ocasiones, el rastro se estancó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1994, Shannon Melendi, de 19 años, desapareció mientras estaba en la Universidad de Emory. Su desaparición permaneció un misterio durante diez años, hasta que una nueva prueba científica proporcionó una nueva pista sobre Colvin "Butch" Hinton.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Con un pie en el crimen
programme.desc: El cuerpo descompuesto de una mujer joven fue descubierto en un canal de irrigación de Bakersfield. Si había rastros de evidencia, se había lavado con el agua.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This scientific detective story traces the evidence for Big Al the allosaur's existence, using clues from climate change studies, forensics, and fossil records to bring him back to life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the ophthalmosaurus and the ornithocheirus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the Leaellynasaura and the Tyrannosaurus.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve is going large as he focuses on the biggest animals to have ever walked the earth. In his dino-den, he starts by meeting the Argentinosaurus, an animal so large that even its poo was deadly.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic was home to the most vicious and violent predators the world has ever seen. To survive, herbivores had to fight back. Steve Backshall goes on a mission to track down the deadliest of all dinosaur defenders.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve tries to chomp through a car like a T. rex, wield an axe like an Allosaurus and hitch a ride in Britain's biggest tank to showcase the might of a Spinosaurus.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve gets freaky on a mission to find the weirdest dinosaur ever. He kick-starts with a Gigantoraptor, an 8-metre tall giant that laid the biggest eggs in history.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve discovers just what it takes to be a terror from the skies. He straps himself into one of Britain's fastest wind tunnels where he goes head-to-head against Microraptor.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve travels to new depths as he discovers just what it takes to be an aquatic terror. His quest sees him rocket through water in spectacular style, just like an Ophthalmosaurus.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve's on a mission to find dinosaurs that have something a little special: fearsome killers, with incredible abilities! Get ready for a sensory sensation! His quest sees him race in the dark like a Troodon.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve goes on an undercover mission to unearth the sneakiest dinosaurs that were far deadlier than they first appeared.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve Backshall is on the hunt for the most deadly animals to have ever walked the earth, dinosaurs. Steve goes on a mission to uncover what was deadlier than the dinosaurs, from monsoons and super-sized sandstorms to ballistic bacteria and gory gas.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve Backshall looks back at the most awesome experiments over the series and chooses his highlights.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles presents a series charting the history of the breakthroughs and watersheds in our long quest to understand our ancient past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles shows how discoveries in the 18th and 19th centuries overturned ideas of when and where civilisation began, as empires competed to 'own' the past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Richard Miles shows how 20th-century attention turned from civilisation and kings to the search for the common man against a background of science and competing political ideologies.

programme.title: Prehistoric Autopsy
programme.desc: Anatomist Professor Alice Roberts and biologist Dr George McGavin go on an extraordinary evolutionary journey to meet our ancient ancestors. They start with our closest prehistoric relative, a Neanderthal.

programme.title: Prehistoric Autopsy
programme.desc: The team go back 1.5 million years to meet one of the earliest humans, Homo erectus. They walked the earth far longer than any other human species and were the first ancestors to look a lot like we do today.

programme.title: Prehistoric Autopsy
programme.desc: The team looks at probably the most famous of all our early ancestors. She is called Lucy from the species Australopithecus afarensis, and she lived 3.2 million years ago. Lucy's species had traded life in the trees for life on the ground.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Starting in Uruk, the `mother of all cities', in southern Iraq, Richard travels to Syria, Egypt, Anatolia and Greece, tracing the birth and development of technology and culture.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar Milan's Dog Psychology Center in Los Angeles is both the home and refuge to nearly 50 dogs who are a resource in his work.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar's toughest cases have included a bulldog that munched on skateboards, a dog that gnawed garden hoses and basketballs, and a pit bull with issues.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An Australian shepherd bites people and lunges at strangers since losing an eye; a hound from an animal-testing lab fears people; a Maltese shows aggressive behavior and relieves itself on the carpet.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A blue heeler/Australian shepherd mix is overprotective of his owners; a school bus severely injures an American Staffordshire terrier; finding a new companion for a French bulldog.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A blue heeler puts herself in danger chasing her owner's pickup truck; an American Eskimo/border collie mix won't walk; a golden retriever is aggressive.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A firehouse Dalmatian; a dog becomes aggressive toward his owners after being attacked by two other dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A border collie/springer spaniel mix bolts toward small animals; a shepherd mix has a biting problem; a pushy poodle.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Basset hounds sibling rivalry; aggressive dog; possessive poodle-mix.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps a disrespectful yellow Lab who causes chaos everywhere she goes and some dogs who are misbehaving at the office.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A French bulldog fails the doggy day-care entrance exam; three Jack Russell terriers fight one another for their owner's attention; a beagle howls incessantly while on walks.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A mail carrier learns to thwart dog attacks; two Pomeranians attack each other when left alone; a Swiss mountain dog is aggressive around food.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A miniature schnauzer compulsively spins in circles; four French bulldogs do not listen to their owner; a mixed breed has a leash tied so tightly it has to be surgically removed.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A dog with a dark side has a knack for stalking and killing small animals; a poodle chases cars; a bulldog has an adverse reaction to skateboarders.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A rescued dog is too ferocious; an insane Great Dane upsets a household; playing matchmaker for a lonely but picky boxer.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Once a criminal himself, Dog knows how it feels to be hunted. In this episode, Dog and the team delve into the depths of Honolulu's Chinatown as they search for a young Samoan girl who's gone down the wrong path. After a frustrating day of hunting, D

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Jim is a bondsman and longtime friend of Dog. Jim's son has just started in the family business. Today Jim has asked Dog to track down a potentially dangerous fugitive, and take his son along for some training with the best in the world.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What's a father to do? When the cops ask Dog for help tracking down a renegade teen with a history of running hard, Baby Lyssa, eight months pregnant and counting, insists on joins the hunt. Can Dog keep his daughter safe and catch his man?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team get a big surprise after they track down Bosco, a fugitive who they believe is addicted to methamphetamines. They discover he's off drugs, settling into a normal life with a new girlfriend, and is very friendly.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth are finally getting married! They've been together for more than ten years, but Dog is determined, as he puts it, to "marry his common law wife the Christian way."

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has problems when he goes to a small town on the Big Island of Hawaii to track down a fugitive. In a small town, everyone knows everyone else's business, making it impossible for Dog to hunt in secret.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's case involves a Samoan, so Dog knows that the runner's close-knit kinfolk holds the keys to bringing him in. Dog's plan is to convince the family that everyone is best served if the fugitive mans up and takes care of business.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is out to make two grabs on two islands in one day. Part of the team is goes to Kona to nab a woman who skipped her court date. Meanwhile, Dog and the others hunt Patrick, a fugitive who's fighting in an Extreme Boxing event on the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The bounty-hunter adventures of Duane "Dog" Chapman and his Posse are chronicled in this one hour "Best Of" special, featuring superlative memorable moments from the previous seven seasons.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The cameras are turned around, as we get a tour of life "behind the scenes" on Dog the Bounty Hunter. Using interviews with Dog and the posse, the TV crew, and never before seen footage, this is one of most revealing and heartfelt episodes of the series.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Things are seldom what they seem in the world of bounty hunting. When the fugitive's girlfriend offers to help Dog trap this dangerous felon, Dog knows that someone is being deceived, the only question is whom?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With the aid of the runner's girlfriend, the posse heads out to bring a client with a checkered past in. Little does the team suspect that before the end of the day, Dog will be helping to mend a family torn apart by violence.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today, Dog's bounty is about to take him on a trip down memory lane and test his investigative chops. With each lead propelling him closer and closer to his childhood haunts, Dog uses old-fashioned detective skills to track his prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In between tracking down a potentially dangerous ex-con facing a five-year stretch in the big house, Leland is struggling to find time to train and compete for his first boxing match in years.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter: Baby's Back in Town
programme.desc: Dog tries to nab a fugitive, named Wayne, by calling and telling him that he's won a new vacuum cleaner and he should stick around to get it. Dog then sends his daughter, Lyssa, to "deliver" the vacuum cleaner and lure Wayne out of his house.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The team is still in Colorado, and today Dog starts his day by to giving his kids and crew a sample of their western heritage by taking them horseback riding. This hunt takes Dog back to his old stomping grounds in Denver.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Leland has to attend a Lamaze class before he can join the hunt--another Chapman is on the way! But when Dog starts to go after this accused jewelry thief without his fastest son, he learns that this fugitive puts the "R" in runner.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team need to help Leland hunt down some elusive fugitives The case is a family affair with both mother and daughter in trouble with the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For a guy who started life as a free spirited outlaw-biker, Dog has certainly turned into a family man. His children touch everything he does today, from searching for the perfect gift for his daughter Cecily's birthday to hunting a fugitive.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Successfully proving Blake and Alexis dishonorable, Ben is given control of the South China Sea leases; Steven attempts to uncover Adam's secret; Dominique's wedding day approaches; Sammy Jo and Clay find romance by candlelight.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake attacks Alexis when she attempts to take over the mansion; an emotionally disturbed Claudia is trapped by a wall of flame; Sammy Jo and Amanda fight for Clay's affections; Dominique learns the truth about Garrett's first marriage.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis's life is spared as Krystle is able to restrain Blake's lethal temper; as La Mirage burns, Amanda is rescued by a mysterious stranger; Claudia is claimed victim by the ravaging flames.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: An incensed Blake discovers the morning headlines accusing him of murder and arson; Adam offers his loyalties to Alexis and Colbyco; Alexis acquires enough stock to assume control of Denver-Carrington.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: As Krystle recovers from the accident, Alexis persuades the D.A. to suspect Blake of arson; Dominique offers Blake a 50 million dollar loan; Phill Thorpe threatens to murder Krystle in retribution against Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake fires the La Mirage manager for withholding crucial information regarding the fire; Alexis offers a reward for the arrest and conviction of the arsonist; Michael Culhane continues to romance Amanda.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle's dizzy spells force her to see a doctor; Jackie remembers seeing the La Mirage blaze start in Claudia's room, proving Blake's innocence; Blake receives a letter from Caress, pleading for his help.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake's trip to Caracas to free Caress proves unsuccessful; Dex's proposal of marriage to Alexis is rejected; Blake catches Michael Culhane and Amanda in a passionate embrace and immediately fires the promiscuous chauffeur.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake and Dex's plan to free Caress from prison succeeds, as she returns to Denver with a fever for revenge; Sammy Jo is pregnant with Clay's baby and warns Steven no court would deny her custody of Danny.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Caress vows retribution for her years of imprisonment; Michael Culhane uses Zach Powers to acquire thirty percent of "The Crater" project; Sammy Jo tells a distraught Clay of her pregnancy; Caress blackmails Emily Falimont.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Caress continues to extort Emily Fallmont; Clay, suffering from guilt, proposes marriage to Sammy Jo, Las Vega style; Michael is forced to tell Amanda the truth; Emily tells Buck of her past with Ben and fleeing from his rage.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: A dying Emily begs Blake to use the letter she wrote to bring an end to Alexis and Ben's treachery; Clay and Sammy Jo are married, Nick Kimball relentlessly pursues Dominique's affections; Blake rejects Michael Culhane's efforts for a reconciliation.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Using Emily's letter, Blake devises a way to regain his empire; Sammy Jo learns she is not pregnant, but keeps it a secret from Clay; fearing Michael Culhane's deceitful intentions.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis relinquishes control of Denver-Carrington and the mansion back to Blake; Ben battles Alexis for equal control of Colbyco; Michael Culhane and Alexis form an alliance against Blake.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex amasses a bundle by playing the stock market on paper for his economics class, and courts disaster by secretly investing his father's money.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory's handsome but shy French tutor, Jeff, finally musters up the nerve to ask her out and then courts disaster by enlisting Alex's advice on how to behave on the date.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: As Big Brother to a 10-year-old Vietnamese boy, Alex tries to mold Ming into his own image, and he learns an unforgettable lesson when he breaks a promise to the adoring child.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Soon after freelance architect Elyse Keaton hires her friend Suzanne Davis to handle clerical chores, she wants to fire the under-qualified, overly aggressive secretary.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex gets stuck babysitting for his little sister Jennifer, who is fed up with feeling in the way at his poker game and decides to disappear.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: While gearing up to face the television cameras as captain of his high school's team on "Quiz-Em", Alex panics at first when a teammate drops out and then launches a tutoring program a la Eliza Doolittle for his sister Mallory.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Elyse gets so wrapped up in work that she neglects her family.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When pretty Carrie Newman and her mother Julia come to visit the Keatons, Carrie's forward behavior sends Alex into a panic.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Steven and Elyse realize how lucky they are when their friends come over for a visit, but are unaware that it will be for the last time.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory secretly submits a picture of Elyse and herself to an ad agency for a mother-daughter-modeling contest.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Steven's assistant at the station is bright, talented, funny, and witty...and in love with him.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When Mallory's boyfriend Jeff arrives home from college and wants to go steady, she's elated, but it's soon apparent that he's a little awed by the school and merely grasping at the familiar.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: While working as a DJ at the school radio station, Alex strikes up a telephone friendship with caller Lorraine Ferrar.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: A cynical Alex finds the spirit of Christmas in a dream.

programme.desc: Alex anxiously awaits a crucial college recommendation from his English teacher.

programme.desc: On his 18th birthday, Alex defies his mother and goes off with some of his buddies to celebrate at an out-of-town nightclub.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex discovers that his idol, young Uncle Ned, has a serious drinking problem.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex pretends to support the Equal Rights Amendment to impress a pretty feminist.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory turns to Alex for some advice when she begins to fear she'll lose her new boyfriend unless she agrees to his pleas for a more "adult" romance.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex courts disaster when he invites two dates to the senior prom. He devises an elaborate scheme for escorting each of the unknowing girls on a night to remember.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.desc: A severe drought threatens -- and divides -- Colorado Springs at Thanksgiving.

programme.desc: While trying to get through to a troubled young drug addict, Monica tells her the legend of Billie Holiday and her powerful song about lynchings in the South.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica is called for jury duty and must vote whether or not a man should get the death penalty.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
